requirements.title: Mode detection
acceptance_criteria: is_teams_mode_available() returns true when env truthy + version >= 2.1.32 + no --no-teams
honors settings.json env entry
rejects version < 2.1.32 with a one-line note
respects --no-teams flag
defaults to subagents when env unset

requirements.title: Flattened nested-team patterns
acceptance_criteria: Every previously-nested team pattern flattens to Lead-owned dispatch
No agent body claims to spawn a team
Skill bodies describe Lead-owned dispatch in both modes

requirements.title: Cross-session lock layer
acceptance_criteria: acquire_lock writes a JSON file with holder/scope_glob/acquired_at/ttl_seconds
globs_intersect correctly detects path-glob overlap
detect_stale + release_lock recover from TTL-expired locks
malformed lock files are treated as stale

requirements.title: Hook trigger split
acceptance_criteria: review-gate-task.py handles both PostToolUse(TaskUpdate) and TaskCompleted
teammate-idle-check.py handles both SubagentStop and TeammateIdle
pipeline-completion-audit.py keeps Stop trigger (unchanged)
Exit code 2 = block-with-feedback in both modes

requirements.title: Agent role-definition rewrite
acceptance_criteria: Every agents/*.md body names 'teammate' or 'long-lived'
No agent body claims to spawn a team
Frontmatter tools/model still validate

requirements.title: Pipeline-skill dispatch-mode section
acceptance_criteria: Each pipeline SKILL.md contains a ## Dispatch mode section
Section references CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS, 2.1.32, --no-teams
Teams-mode primitives (Spawn teammate, SendMessage, shared task list) named

requirements.title: Setup ergonomics + docs
acceptance_criteria: setup.py --check-only reports flag + version status
setup.py prompts for consent before writing settings.json
README documents the requirement
CLAUDE.md overview names teams mode

non_functional.title: Backwards compatibility
non_functional.verified_by: All existing tests pass; subagents-mode codepath unchanged

non_functional.title: No new external dependencies
non_functional.verified_by: New helpers (teams_mode.py, locks.py) use stdlib only

playwright_rationale: No UI surface; this is plugin metadata + Python helpers + hook scripts. Mode-detection + lock-layer end-to-end coverage is via pytest, not browser flows.
dev_api_integration_rationale: No live dev API; the plugin operates on its own files. Setup-CLI end-to-end tests are the closest equivalent and are in scope.
front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — no front/back layers; infrastructure-only change.
